heading: Penalties for violations
label: 1884 Penalties for violations
text: A bank or savings association which violates a rule promulgated pursuant to this chapter shall be subject to a civil penalty which shall not exceed $100 for each day of the violation.
notes: Amendments2010— struck out “and loan” after “savings”.Pub. L. 111–203
Effective Date of 2010 AmendmentAmendment by effective on the transfer date, see , set out as a note under , The Congress.Pub. L. 111–203section 351 of Pub. L. 111–203section 906 of Title 2
